title: Warium Tweaked
description: A (currently) small mod that expands upon the default Warium mod
body:
![Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa0ad9838f811084fd4d86c63c16f946c6953de7_0.webp)

Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [Warium](https://modrinth.com/mod/warium)

**Warium Tweaked is a small addon to Warium that modifies and adds some new content**

List of current features:
- **Gun HUD**
- **Gun, Ammo, and Magazine descriptions**
  - The descriptions include what ammo can be loaded, as well as a short tutorial for how to load the weapon
- **New Armor**
  - **Tactical Armor** (Black & Green)
  - **Pilot Helmet** (4 Variants) - Compatible with the Thin Air mod
  - **Parachute Pack**
- **Gun Sensitivity Changes** (Decreases sensitivity for weapons when aiming, scoped weapons decrease sensitivity even further)
